author: khr0907
description: Visualize your notes in a 3D semantic space using embedding-based layouts or uploaded vectors. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: KHR0907
manifest.description: Visualize your notes in a 3D semantic space using embedding-based layouts or uploaded vectors.
manifest.name: 3D Semantic Graph

name: 3D Semantic Graph

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Semantic search** — a toolbar search box embeds your query and highlights the top-10 semantically closest notes in the 3D graph, flying the camera to the best match. Click a result to fly to it, double-click to open the note.
- **Auto-labeled semantic clusters** — cluster regions are now grouped by embedding similarity (seeded k-means) with topic labels auto-generated from note titles and tags (e.g. "관측 · 우주 · 천문학"). Switch back to folder grouping via Settings → Cluster grouping.
- **Much faster open** — content hashes moved to a lightweight `embeddings-hashes.json`, so reopening an unchanged vault skips parsing the full vector cache entirely (~330 ms for a 753-note vault). Vectors now load on demand when the insights panel opens.
- **Smarter link suggestions** — suggested links are ranked by cosine similarity plus shared-tag, same-folder, and co-link signals.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/KHR0907/obsidian-3d-semantic-graph/compare/1.3.8...1.4.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- **Entry animation** — nodes expand from the center and the camera flies in when the graph opens (1.4s ease-out). Interrupted instantly by any mouse interaction; respects OS reduced-motion; can be disabled in Settings → Appearance → Entry animation.
- **Instant reopen with layout cache** — reduced 3D coordinates are now cached in `layout-cache.json`, so reopening the graph on an unchanged vault skips the UMAP/PCA recomputation entirely and renders immediately. The cache is invalidated automatically when notes, projection settings, or the layout seed change.
- Status text now shows "Checking embedding cache..." during cache validation instead of the misleading "Generating embeddings...".

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/KHR0907/obsidian-3d-semantic-graph/compare/1.3.7...1.3.8

releases.author: KHR0907
releases.description:
## Improvements

- **Better link and grid readability.** Link lines and the XZ grid previously blended into the scene background on both themes. Base link opacity is raised (0.2 → 0.45), grid opacity increased, and link/grid colors retuned per theme based on their blended on-screen result — recessive but clearly legible. The HTML export uses the same link alpha for consistency.

releases.author: KHR0907
releases.description: Identical to 1.3.5 (all automated-review lint findings resolved; zero errors and warnings under eslint-plugin-obsidianmd + typescript-eslint type-checked). Re-released because the 1.3.5 scan raced the asset upload and saw an assetless release.

releases.author: KHR0907
releases.description:
## Improvements

- Resolve every finding from the automated community review (verified locally with the same ruleset — eslint-plugin-obsidianmd + typescript-eslint type-checked — now zero errors, zero warnings):
  - Proper typing for `Object.entries`/`fromEntries`/`padStart` (tsconfig lib ES2020) — clears the `no-unsafe-*` warning chains
  - Typed control-value coercion in the settings pane (`no-base-to-string`)
  - `createEl` instead of `createElement` (`obsidianmd/prefer-create-el`)
  - No deprecated APIs: shared `renderPane()` for `display()`/`update()`, `mod-warning` class instead of `setWarning()`, native title tooltip instead of `setDynamicTooltip()`
  - Implements `getSettingDefinitions()` (settings-search support on Obsidian 1.13+) while keeping the `display()` fallback for 1.11+
- No functional changes to the graph itself.

releases.author: KHR0907
releases.description:
## Fixes

- Fix the automated community review `no-unsupported-api` failure: the reset button used `ButtonComponent.setDestructive()` (Obsidian 1.13-only) while `minAppVersion` is 1.11.0. It now uses `setWarning()`, available since 0.11.0, with the same attention styling. No other behavior change from 1.3.3.

releases.author: KHR0907
releases.description:
## Fixes

- Resolve the automated community review failure (`no-unsupported-api`): the settings code referenced the Obsidian 1.13-only `SettingDefinitionItem` type while `minAppVersion` is 1.11.0. The declarative definitions now use a local type and are rendered via `display()`, so no 1.13 API symbol remains in source. No behavior change from 1.3.2 — the settings pane renders identically on Obsidian 1.11+.

releases.author: KHR0907
releases.description:
## Fixes

- **Settings pane now renders on Obsidian below 1.13.** The settings tab was migrated to the 1.13 declarative settings API, which left the pane blank on older Obsidian versions. It now renders from a `display()` fallback that walks the same definitions with the stable `Setting` API, so no settings are duplicated.
- Lowered `minAppVersion` from 1.13.0 to **1.11.0** so the plugin installs and runs on the current public stable channel.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.3.1

- **Timeline date source is now configurable** — new setting under Graph: *File created time* (default) or *Frontmatter `created` / `date created`* with file-time fallback
- The default behavior returns to plain file created time; frontmatter dates are opt-in

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.3.0

### Korean and English UI
- New **Language** setting (auto / English / 한국어) under General settings
- **Auto** follows the Obsidian app language — Korean users get a fully localized UI out of the box
- Covers the graph toolbar, insights panel, semantic neighbors sidebar, timeline, settings tab, notices, and the HTML export overlay

### Review hygiene
- Removed the unused ngraph force engine from the bundle — the plugin no longer ships any runtime code generation (`new Function`)
- Fixed a stale default value in the UMAP neighbors setting description

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.2.0

Migrates the settings tab to the declarative Settings API introduced in Obsidian 1.13.

- Settings are now defined via `getSettingDefinitions()` — they appear in Obsidian's settings search, and slider values are shown inline
- Destructive reset button uses the new `setDestructive()` styling
- **Requires Obsidian 1.13.0 or newer** (raised from 1.7.2)

No functional changes to the graph, insights, timeline, neighbors, or export features.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## 1.1.1

Maintenance release addressing automated review findings.

- Restore the registered plugin ID `3d-semantic-graph` (1.1.0 shipped with a mismatched ID and could not be picked up by the directory)
- Raise `minAppVersion` to 1.7.2 to match the async `revealLeaf` API in use
- Type embedding API responses properly instead of unsafe `any` access
- Use `activeDocument` / `window.setTimeout` for popout window compatibility
- Update `lodash-es` past advisory GHSA-r5fr-rjxr-66jc
- Release assets now ship with GitHub artifact attestations for build provenance

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New in 1.1.0

### Insights panel
- **Suggested links** — semantically close but unlinked note pairs, ranked by cosine similarity, drawn as dashed lines in the 3D scene with one-click link insertion
- **Potential duplicates** — note pairs with near-identical content (similarity ≥ 93%)
- **Orphan notes** — notes without any links (works without embeddings)
- **MOC generation** — create a Map of Content note for any folder cluster in one click
- Computation runs in a single async pass with a live progress indicator, so large vaults never freeze the UI

### Local embeddings (Ollama)
- New embedding provider: run fully offline against a local Ollama server — no API key required
- Model presets: `nomic-embed-text`, `mxbai-embed-large`, `bge-m3`

### Timeline playback
- Replay your vault's growth over time with a play button and scrubber
- Uses frontmatter `created` / `date created` when present (survives vault copies and git clones), falling back to file ctime

### Semantic neighbors sidebar
- New right-sidebar view showing the active note's nearest semantic neighbors as a mini 3D graph plus a ranked similarity list
- Reuses the existing embedding cache — never triggers API calls

### Interactive HTML export
- Download the current graph as a standalone HTML file with positions baked in
- Node clicks deep-link back into your vault via `obsidian://` URLs
